US-WS-024 normalized terminal transcript
Generated from packages/cli/test/workspace-create-recovery.e2e.test.ts through the real CLI entrypoint.
Runtime paths and SHA-256 values are redacted only after the assertions bind them to real output.

$ roll workspace create ws-e2e --config <CONFIG> --check --json
{
  "mode": "check",
  "outcome": "created",
  "workspaceId": "ws-e2e",
  "configSha256": "<CONFIG_SHA256>",
  "planSha256": "<PLAN_SHA256>"
}

$ roll workspace create ws-e2e --config <CONFIG> --authorization <CREATE_NEW_INTENT> --json
{
  "error": {
    "code": "invalid_apply_authorization"
  }
}

$ roll workspace create ws-e2e --config <CONFIG> --authorization <OWNER_APPROVED_AUTHORIZATION> --json
{
  "mode": "apply",
  "outcome": "created",
  "authorizationSource": "owner_after_preview"
}

$ roll workspace create ws-e2e --config <CONFIG> --check --json
{
  "outcome": "repaired",
  "recovery": {
    "kind": "legacy_completed",
    "journalPath": "<ROLL_HOME>/workspace-init/ws-e2e.pending.json"
  }
}

$ roll workspace create ws-e2e --config <CONFIG> --json
{
  "outcome": "repaired",
  "recovery": {
    "kind": "legacy_completed"
  }
}

$ roll workspace create ws-e2e --config <CONFIG> --json
{
  "outcome": "reused"
}
